positive: A cosmic mountainscape vista at twilight. The foreground features stylized, smooth geometric mountains emerging from a deep sapphire and indigo liquid body. Above, the sky is a vibrant gradient wash of coral pink, electric teal, and soft lavender. Include delicate constellations and nebulae rendered as glowing, bioluminescent particles. Style should be highly detailed, minimalist abstract art, reminiscent of sophisticated modern poster design. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring clean, high-contrast silhouettes against the glowing sky. Lighting should be dramatic rim lighting emphasizing the mountain contours. Aspect ratio should be square, perfect for textile printing.
negative: blurry, amateur, poor anatomy, artifacts, text, logos, watermark, low quality, cluttered, noise, multiple subjects, bad composition, dirty, grainy
